title: Hidden Face
tmdbOverview: Su-yeon, a cellist in an orchestra led by her fiancé and conductor Sung-jin, disappears one day, leaving behind only a video recording. Sung-jin is devasted over the loss of Su-yeon, but feels a strong attraction to Mi-ju, a cellist who fills in for his fiancée. Then one rainy night, Sung-jin and Mi-ju get swept away by their mutual desires for each other and commit an unforgivable act at Su-yeon's house.
synopsis: Released in 2024, Hidden Face is a mystery and thriller film from South Korea. It carries a 6.2 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2020s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a 16 certification (BE rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
